title: eucalyptus × chrysantha
intro: Eucalyptus × chrysantha, also known as the yellow gum, is a hybrid tree of the eucalyptus species, resulting from the cross between Eucalyptus tereticornis and Eucalyptus globulus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include decongestant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Eucalyptus × chrysantha include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing coughs, with its essential oil being a key component in achieving these effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Eucalyptus × chrysantha plant are often used in teas, inhalers, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
